chapters.title: Open yourself to Abraham's guidance
chapters.text:
"Ask and It Is Given" will not improve your life unless you receive it with genuine openness and belief. Everything depends on whether you trust what you are reading enough to let it influence your choices. Revisit the material often, keep it nearby, and allow your vibration to reconnect with the source of information it describes.

To benefit from the Law of Attraction, you must believe it works. Stay receptive to Abraham's teachings and absorb each lesson rather than skimming for quick tips.

Who is Abraham? Non-physical energy — a collection of non-physical entities that share knowledge through Esther Hicks as one voice. When Hicks first experienced clairaudience, Abraham explained why she had been chosen to channel these teachings. They wanted to write a book and explain the Law of Attraction to the world. Esther serves as the channel; her husband Jerry supports the work.

Did you know? Clairaudience means "the power to hear sounds that exist beyond ordinary capacity or experience."

chapters.title: You shape the experiences you live through
chapters.text:
Abraham wants you to feel happy and satisfied with your current state — where you are in life right now. Yet many people are not. To begin the journey, focus on feeling good, protecting your well-being, and choosing happiness more deliberately.

Turn attention to the present day instead of living in the past or worrying about the future.

You cannot manifest your ideal life unless you learn to inhabit the present. Your power exists in this very moment. Doing so reconnects you with the non-physical part of yourself that vibrates wants and desires to the Universe.

Most people carry unfulfilled desires, which makes them unhappy with where they are. They feel stuck, cannot see a way forward, and grow disillusioned with life.

Unfulfilled desires are common; assuming they will never happen is what leaves you feeling stuck and unable to move in any direction.

chapters.title: Reconnect with source energy
chapters.text:
The first step toward improvement is reconnecting with source energy — the Universe, the power you were born into and gradually forgot. Remember that there is nothing you cannot be and nothing you cannot have. That requires believing what you learn and releasing preconceived ideas picked up throughout your human journey.

You are the creator of your own reality. ~ Esther Hicks & Jerry Hicks

You are born knowing you can have whatever you want, but life teaches you to forget, and disillusionment follows. Connecting with source energy awakens the memory you were born with so you can manifest the life you want.

That knowledge was taken from you through experiences and what other people told you. Reconnecting lets you reclaim your power.

Many people wonder why fulfillment takes so long or never arrives. Often they hold a vibration that does not match what they desire. Reconnect by aligning frequencies. Become aware of thoughts and deliberately ensure they align with what you want to manifest. Do not confuse the signals.

The vibrations of what you want and what you are trying to manifest need to match. Stay consciously aware of your thoughts.

When you are consciously aware and in control of thoughts, you offer them deliberately and create a new reality. The better you feel, the more aligned you are with source energy. The worse you feel, the more disconnected you are.

chapters.title: How the Law of Attraction works
chapters.text:
The Law of Attraction is among the most powerful laws in the Universe. Everything you think vibrates a signal outward and attracts a matching signal back. When you want something, you think about it, transmit the vibration, and it returns to you.

The Law of Attraction says: That which is like unto itself is drawn. ~ Esther & Jerry Hicks

Signals must match. Compare tuning a radio: if the station broadcasts at 102 FM, dialing 99.4 FM will not deliver what you want. Vibrational frequencies of desire and thought must align the same way.

Thoughts about what you want must match the desire itself. If they do not, vibrations will not successfully manifest what you want.

The more you think about something you want and believe it will be yours, the stronger your signal to the Universe. Then you are in alignment and what you desire can arrive. Meditation helps — focus on breath and direct thoughts accordingly.

Did you know? The Law of Attraction states that the subconscious mind is more powerful than the conscious mind.

chapters.title: Three steps to the life you want
chapters.text:
Abraham simplifies manifestation into three steps for the life you want and the things you desire.

First, ask for what you want. Second, the answer is given. Third, accept it into your life. You handle the first and third; the second is not in your hands.

There are three steps to manifesting what you want — ask, wait for the answer, accept it into your life.

Every question is answered by the Universe. Every desire is given. Many people fail because they skip the third step: they do not fully accept what they want. Abraham calls this mastery the Art of Allowing.

The Art of Allowing means vibrations are in alignment and thoughts and desire match — you allow into life what you ask for.

It also means accepting the thing you want wholeheartedly, without mixed resistance.

Focus on what you want, not what you want to replace. If your car breaks down, do not focus on the old car and list everything wrong with it. That forces vibrations back onto the old car. Focus on the new car instead, and vibrations align with the replacement.

chapters.title: Practice until your signal strengthens
chapters.text:
Learning to manifest everything you desire does not come easily to everyone; practice is required. The more you practice and the longer you allow vibrations to build, the more successful manifestation becomes.

Practice and focus on what you want. The more you practice, the stronger your summoning power will be.

Main factors are the degree to which you desire what you want, how specific you are, and how long you have wanted it. When all are high, vibrations are stronger and manifestation is more likely to happen faster. Wanting something for a long time produces far stronger manifesting power than a wish formed yesterday.

The power to manifest something you desire will be far stronger if you have wanted it for a long time.

chapters.title: Your emotional set point shapes results
chapters.text:
Your emotional set point is where you are emotionally right now — happy, sad, joyful, angry, or depressed. Feeling good gives you a far greater chance of raising vibrations and manifesting what you desire.

Your emotional set point is how you are feeling right now. You can change it, and it will fluctuate naturally over time.

Emotions change regularly, so the set point changes with them. You can influence it by being mindful of thoughts. It is easy to let thoughts wander toward whatever is happening around you, but if you want to manifest desires, focus thoughts deliberately on what you want. That aligns vibrations, reconnects you with source energy, and resets the emotional set point.

Focus thoughts to control emotions. Feeling good gives you a better chance of manifesting what you want.

You have power over emotions even when it does not feel that way, because drifting thought creates the illusion of helplessness. Use conscious thought to direct emotions. Then, when you expect something to come, it often arrives.

If you are feeling low, direct your mind toward positives, raising emotional set point and vibrations. Emotions are powerful, but they can be guided.

chapters.title: Shift thought patterns that block change
chapters.text:
Many people believe they must go out and work hard to get what they want. That is not the case. It is not up to you to make something happen; it is up to you to ask, and the Universe will grant it.

It's not your job to make something happen — Universal forces are in place for all of that. Your work is to simply determine what you want. ~ Esther & Jerry Hicks

If things have not been going your way, your thoughts need to change. Nothing shifts unless you change. Doing everything the same way does not bring new results. No situation is immune to change when you think about it differently.

You become the things you think about. Negative thinking attracts negativity through the Law of Attraction. Positive, hopeful thinking attracts positive circumstances.

Consider situations in your life and whether you can choose to think about them differently to receive different results.

chapters.title: Practical tools that ease resistance
chapters.text:
When you start trying to manifest desires, you may struggle because thoughts are stuck in old patterns and need a different approach. It may also be because you need to raise your emotional set point.

Through Hicks, Abraham shares strategies for various situations that bring better manifestation results. These strategies remove resistance and align vibrations.

Be sure to remove resistance from your path to help manifestation attempts.

The prosperity game helps when you want to be more specific about desires before manifesting them. Imagine a checking account and deposit $1,000. Spend that $1,000, imagining purchases and how good they feel. The next day deposit $2,000 and spend again. Continue over time.

The point is improving imagination and specificity so the Universe can respond accordingly.

Another strategy is evaluating dreams. Sometimes we dream about what we are trying to manifest because dreams match waking thoughts. That means you are giving desire a lot of thought and making progress. Evaluating dreams reveals whether you are manifesting something you truly want.

Evaluating dreams helps you work out whether you are manifesting something you really want. Dreams reflect thoughts during waking hours.

Before sleep, relax and tell yourself you will rest well and wake refreshed, recalling anything important.

When you wake, spend quiet moments thinking about dreams — the best time to evaluate because details remain vivid. A good feeling means you are manifesting something you want. Bad or awkward feelings suggest changing direction toward something more useful.

Analyzing dreams when you wake is ideal because small details are easier to remember.

chapters.title: Conclusion
chapters.text:
The Law of Attraction is extremely powerful and can bring everything you desire when you believe in it by matching thoughts with desire. When vibrations align, when you focus and expect positive results, you welcome good things quickly.

Using Esther Hicks as a channel, Abraham teaches that minds have forgotten we can have anything we want. We have become disillusioned and stuck, losing sight of our power. Rather than letting negativity take over or staying in a rut, learn to manifest what you have dreamed of using the Law of Attraction as intended.

Try this

1. Think carefully about your life right now. Are you satisfied? What desires have not yet been fulfilled?

2. Try meditating fifteen minutes per day. Sit undisturbed, get comfortable, close your eyes, and focus on breath. If a thought enters, acknowledge it and let it float away.

3. Make sure you believe in the power of the Law of Attraction. Meditate on it, focus on it, and let positivity about the law grow.

Read it till the end?
